assertions.description: XSLTProcessor is still exposed during the deprecation window — once removal completes, this will be undefined.
If XSLTProcessor remains, it is a constructor (function).
If XSLTProcessor exists it must expose importStylesheet on its prototype.
If XSLTProcessor exists it must expose transformToFragment on its prototype.
An xml-stylesheet PI in an XML document still parses (DOMParser does not throw); whether XSLT is applied is a separate UA decision.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const p=new DOMParser();const doc=p.parseFromString('<?xml version=\"1.0\"?><?xml-stylesheet type=\"text/xsl\" href=\"x.xsl\"?><root/>','application/xml');return !doc.querySelector('parsererror');}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: ReportingObserver / DeprecationReport is exposed so the deprecation can be observed.
